event.description:
Lucidworks' Francis Crimmins will give a talk about how Signals, Events, and Recommendations work in Solr and Lucidworks Fusion. More details to follow!

Francis Crimmins is a software consultant at Lucidworks and has previously worked as one of the founders of Funnelback, a search technology company with blue chip clients like Skype, Rolls Royce and Cambridge University. Prior to that he was a Research Engineer at Australia's national research agency, the CSIRO.

Agenda:

6:30-7pm: mingling

7-8pm: talk

8pm-... more mingling!
event.title: Signals, Events, and Recommendations in Solr and Lucidworks Fusion
